Upload a profile avatar by URL, Cloudinary publicId, or multipart file; validation and profile update happen in background. If avatar already exists, pass ?replace=true or clear it first using PUT /users/:id/profile with { avatar: null }.

Upload a profile banner by URL, Cloudinary publicId, or multipart file; validation and profile update happen in background. If banner already exists, pass ?replace=true or clear it first using PUT /users/:id/profile with { banner: null }.

get.description: Get Cloudinary upload signature and credentials for direct client upload

post.description: Register a direct client upload (Cloudinary public id) so the server can validate, create an asset record and enqueue processing. Recommended flow: upload media first (or perform direct client upload), then call this endpoint with the provider public id. Server-side validation performed: allowed MIME types (image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp), max file size (enforced by the media worker, see MAX_POST_IMAGE_BYTES env), and optional checks per `kind` (e.g., avatar/banner uniqueness). Use `kind=advert_image` for advert images. The endpoint returns a job id ??? poll `GET /media/jobs/:id` for processing status and detailed per-asset errors (e.g., file_too_large, unsupported_media_type). If you intend to attach media to a post or advert, wait until job status is `completed` and asset record has a `url` before creating the record.

get.description: Get status for a media processing job

post.description: Upload avatar file (multipart) - server accepts file and enqueues background validation and Cloudinary upload. Use kind=banner to upload a banner. If image already exists, pass ?replace=true or clear it first using PUT /users/:id/profile with { avatar: null } or { banner: null }.

posts_count.description: Denormalized post count for the page (optional; present when the pages table maintains a post_count column)

category_pages_count.description: Total pages in the page category (optional; present if counted)

post.description: Follow a page

schema.description: Empty body accepted; request requires Authorization header. Server ignores body and uses the authenticated user from the Authorization token.

example.note: No body required. Include Authorization: Bearer <token>

requestBody.description: Empty body accepted; request requires Authorization header. Server ignores body and uses the authenticated user from the Authorization token.

delete.description: Unfollow a page

get.description: List followers for a page. Returns a paginator payload at the root.
